leadText: Route 4 (Japanese: ４番道路 Route 4) is a route in central Kalos, connecting Santalune City and Lumiose City. The route is also known as Parterre Way (Japanese: パルテール街道 Parterre Highway).

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The Pokémon X and Y demo takes place on a modified version of this route. Despite Roller Skater Calida stating that she took up roller skating to chase after the Fletchling that fly around the area, wild Fletchling do not inhabit this route. Name origin [ edit | edit source ] Parterre is an ornamental garden characterized by flower beds and paths arranged to form patterns.
